Fields.Name: Map ID
Fields.Description: Specify the map number in 8 digits. Only open and legacy celestial sphere placement maps can be specified

Fields.Name: Transition Source Weather
Fields.Description: Specifies the assets that will be valid in this weather.

Fields.Name: Is Burning Ash
Fields.Description: Specifies whether or not to adapt to the fire ash state of the map.

Fields.Name: Asset ID [0]
Fields.Description: -1: Invalid Specify the asset ID to generate. AEG999_999 999999

Fields.Name: Asset ID [1]
Fields.Description: -1: Invalid Specify the asset ID to generate. AEG999_999 999999

Fields.Name: Create Asset Limit ID [0]
Fields.Description: ID for production restriction. -1: Unlimited. Generation is allowed only if it matches the generation limit ID in Map default parameter .xlsm (SEQ08921).

Fields.Name: Create Asset Limit ID [1]
Fields.Description: ID for production restriction. -1: Unlimited. Generation is allowed only if it matches the generation limit ID in Map default parameter .xlsm (SEQ08921).
